plugins.name: agile-workflow
plugins.description: Agile backlog workflow skills for Azure DevOps. Skills: decompose-backlog, validate-artifact, auto-fix-artifact, split-story, generate-work-item. Deterministic Python orchestrator for quality gates (v0.5.0). Shared rules + Azure linking guardrails.
